'''Mine crabs''' were small but dangerous scavengers who lived within the subterranean levels of [[Artus Prime]]. They did not resemble crabs in the traditional sense, though they scuttled about on three crablike legs. Instead of pincers, mine crabs possessed large mouths lined with sharp teeth. They had red and purple eyes.

Because of their small size, mine crabs worked together to bring down larger prey, such as [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. They were not very strong individually, but greatly made up for this in number. [[Kyle Katarn]] experienced this firsthand when he was on Artus Prime on a [[Battle of Artus Prime|mission]] for [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]. He would also later witness a [[Pit fighting|pit fight]] between two of these creatures in [[Baruk's Bar]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==Behind the scenes==
These creatures can be spawned in the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' game using the code: npc spawn minemonster.
